prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度较高（高热推荐），工商管理、机械类专业热度偏冷（明显劝退/分化观望）。上海市2026年考生总数约66700人，较202 5年49276人增加约35%，竞争显著加剧。；延边大学位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州，距离上海市较远，跨省就读的地域偏好对上海 考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 27738 → 26729 → 24317 → 23293 → 27085, showing an overall fluctuating trend. Rankings moved forward year by year from 2021 to 2024 (from 27738 to 23293), but in 2025, they significantly moved backward to 27085, a rebound of about 3792 places, indicating large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 27085. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Shanghai was 10 students each year from 2021 to 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan shows 6 students for comprehensive subjects and 4 for medical subjects, totaling still 10 students. However, the comprehensive plan has been reduced from 10 to 6 students, a 40% reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities has been steadily rising: 198th in 2021 → 185th in 2022 → 176th in 2023 → 165th in 2024 → 168th in 2025 → 157th in 2026, showing a steady improvement in overall strength. The reputation of Yanbian University is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission incidents. Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms and relatively stable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University did not achieve A- or above grades. Its advantageous disciplines are mainly in specialized fields such as Korean Language and Literature, and Asian-African Language and Literature, which have weak direct relevance to the majors offered in Shanghai (Business Administration, Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, Electronic Information Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Electronic Information/Communication have high social popularity (highly recommended), while majors like Business Administration and Mechanical Engineering are relatively unpopular (clearly discouraged or divisive/wait-and-see). The total number of examinees in Shanghai in 2026 is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Shanghai. The regional preference for cross-province study may have a certain inhibitory effect on Shanghai candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the 40% reduction in comprehensive enrollment plan in 2026, the approximately 35% increase in the number of Shanghai examinees leading to intensified competition, and the enhanced attractiveness due to the university's rising rankings, while also taking into account the dual impact of the surge in examinee numbers and the remote location, the ranking is moderately adjusted upward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 21085, with a range of 20585-21585.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 20585-21585, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 20585), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Electronic Information Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 21585), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Yanbian University's medical category in Shanghai from 2021 to 2025 were 26748, 30154, 24077, 21226, and 25079 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. Rankings rose from 2021 to 2022 (harder to enter), then continuously declined from 2022 to 2024 (easier to enter), and rebounded to 25079 in 2025. Regarding enrollment plans, the total number of medical category slots from 2021 to 2025 was consistently 4 (2 for Clinical Medicine, 2 for Anesthesiology), and the 2026 plan remains at 4, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a key national university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a Double First-Class construction university, located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province. As a comprehensive public undergraduate institution, its medical programs have a certain influence within the region, but due to its remote geographical location, its appeal to Shanghai candidates is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, medical programs have maintained high popularity nationwide, with fierce competition in specialties such as Clinical Medicine and Anesthesiology. However, Yanbian University is situated in the northeastern border region, far from Shanghai, and geographical factors somewhat weaken its attractiveness to Shanghai candidates. The overall scale of medical enrollment in Shanghai is limited, with Yanbian University offering only two specialties (Clinical Medicine and Anesthesiology) totaling 4 slots, resulting in a relatively stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical ranking fluctuation trends and the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Yanbian University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 24879, a slight increase (easier to enter) compared to 2025 (25079), with a fluctuation range of 24379 to 25379.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Anesthesiology as the main target, with Clinical Medicine as a reach goal.
